items.caption_text:
Pre-loved Chloe C Mini Green Croc Embossed Leather Crossbody Bag up for auction!✨

How it works:
1.⁠ ⁠Bidding starts at ₹45,000💸
2.⁠ ⁠You can place your bids in the comments 💬
3.⁠ ⁠Auction closes in 24 hours, highest bid at closing time wins⌛️
4.⁠ ⁠The winner will receive a DM with the payment details of Dhyan Foundation 🐄
5.⁠ ⁠Your purchase will be confirmed once you share proof of payment (screenshot)💳
6.⁠ ⁠Upon failure to make payment within specified time frame of 15 minutes, the opportunity will be passed on to next highest bidder (if same bid, whoever bids earlier gets preference)❌
7.⁠ ⁠Delivery  timeline: 7-10 days ✨

Item Condition :
-Please check stories for close up pictures.
-Purchased in 2019
-Very nice and well-maintained condition
-Interior is clean and well-maintained
-Edges and corners clean with no scuffing
-Gold hardware intact, with minimal scratches 
-Stitching well preserved
-Dust bag available 

Please Note: 
-⁠100% of the amount goes to the Dhyan Foundation directly.
-⁠Commenting or sending a DM does not confirm purchase.
-Purchase is confirmed only upon full payment.
-The product will be offered to the highest bidder.
-Failure to complete payment within 30 minutes of sharing the payment details,  will result in the item being offered to the next highest bidder.

items.caption_text:
Pre-loved Prada Crossbody Bag Saffiano Leather White up for auction! 🤍

How it works:
-Bidding starts at ₹50,000
-You can place your bids in the comments 💬
-Auction closes in 24 hours, highest bid at closing time wins
-The winner will receive a DM with the payment details of Dhyan Foundation 
-Your purchase will be confirmed once you share proof of payment (screenshot) 
-Upon failure to make payment within specified time frame of 30 minutes, the opportunity will be passed on to next highest bidder (if same bid, whoever bids earlier gets preference)
-Delivery timeline: 7-10 days

Item Condition :
-Please check stories for close up pictures.
-Purchased in 2024 
-Colour preserved & well-maintained condition. 
-Interiors clean and well-maintained. 
-Gold metal hardware in good condition 
-Zipper smooth & fully functional
-Strap, edges and stitching well preserved
-Dust bag available 

Please Note: 
- 100% of the amount goes to the Dhyan Foundation directly.
- Commenting or sending a DM does not confirm purchase.
- Purchase is confirmed only upon full payment.
- The product will be offered to the highest bidder.
​​- Failure to complete payment within 30 minutes of sharing the payment details,  will result in the item being offered to the next highest bidder.
- Please check stories for close up pictures.
